Public organization trust page

Help teams review candidates through concrete work evidence instead of polished claims.

Return to menu
Copy share link
Website
MISSION / PURPOSE

Help teams review candidates through concrete work evidence instead of polished claims.

WHAT WORK IS OFFERED

WORK OFFERED

Proof-first product reviewer

ENGAGEMENT

Full time

Improve review quality through clearer proof expectations.

ASSIGNMENT CLARITY

Review candidate work through structured evidence and launch-safe summaries.

PROOF EXPECTATIONS

Shortlists become more explainable, privacy-safe, and grounded in real work.

EXPECTED OUTCOMES

•
Clarify proof expectations
•
Reduce vague review decisions
SERIOUSNESS OF REVIEW

Verified domain path: test-org.example

Organization trust is verified.

A review-ready assignment is active, so proof

Proofound

Overview

U
PORTFOLIO READINESS
Setup Required
Build your proof-first profile

Welcome back, there. Start by creating your first proof record. Shaping a single trusted work sample or artifact unlocks your profile.

Guided setup

Your profile is private by default. Candidates stay hidden until they explicitly authorize discovery or initiate a verification check.

Privacy choices

Essential cookies keep Proofound working. Optional analytics help us improve the product. We never sell your data.

Privacy Policy
